entities.name: V
entities.context: The user whose daily experiences are being reflected upon and journaled

entities.name: Evening Reflection
entities.context: A structured end-of-day reflection framework with synthesis, acknowledgment, and transition phases

entities.name: Save Protocol
entities.context: Procedure for compiling reflection data into markdown and persisting to database

entities.name: N5
entities.context: System containing scripts and infrastructure for V's knowledge management

entities.name: journal.py
entities.context: Python script at N5/scripts/journal.py for adding journal entries with mood and tags

entities.name: Operator
entities.context: A persona (ID: 90a7486f-46f9-41c9-a98c-21931fa5c5f6) to switch back to after reflection completes

entities.name: Narrative Arc
entities.context: Framework for understanding the emotional and thematic shape of a day during synthesis

relationships.context: Framework designed to help V process and close out each day
Save Protocol is the final step of the Evening Reflection process
Save Protocol executes journal.py to persist compiled reflection data
journal.py is part of the N5 scripts infrastructure
Synthesis step reflects the narrative arc of the day back to V
After Evening Reflection completes, system switches back to Operator persona
